Dialog.name: MSG_OPEN_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}It looks like the door has been unlocked.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I can sense strong Shadows just beyond it... Please be careful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ACCESS_FIRST_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}It seems like it won't open... Do you see anything that I'm missing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ACCESS_FIRST_FUKA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}Wait! The door is glowing![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}But why all of a sudden...? Did you do something, Leader?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ACCESS_FIRST_FUKA_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5122 0 0}A tarot card you have is reacting to the door...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Maybe that card acts like a key for this door...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Interesting... This door certainly works differently from the other ones we've seen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_OPEN_FIRST_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5113 0 0}I don't sense any danger in your immediate vicinity...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}However, there might be a strong enemy further in, just like with the other doors.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}If you feel like you're in danger, please leave quickly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DOOR_FORWARD_SEL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should we explore Monad?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_OPEN_FIRST_FUKA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}You're in a deeper part of the passage now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}The passage is separated by doors and goes even deeper... Please be careful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_STOP_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}You can go further into the passage now. Why don't you take a look?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MONAD_BTL_QUESTION_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 5343 0 0}It's a strong enemy! Are you ready to fight?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MONAD_BTL_QUESTION_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 5343 0 0}You'll have to defeat this enemy to move on... Are you ready?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MONAD_BTL_QUESTION_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 5343 0 0}It's a very powerful enemy! Please make sure you're fully prepared for battle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5068 0 0}I'm detecting immense power beyond this point... Stronger than anything I've seen so far.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Are you ready, Aigis?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}Understood! Let's go, then![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Understood. Let's come back when we're prepared.[n]{f 1 1}
